base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_dungeon_wall_stone — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Stone-brick dungeon walls — ~12 autotile corner/edge variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stone-brick dungeon walls — ~12 autotile corner/edge variants; beige/gray palette
